user_query: I want to explore the beautiful beaches of Hawaii. Can you provide me with a map tile that shows the area around Waikiki Beach at zoom level 13? Additionally, I would like to find webcams in that region to get a live view of the beach.

TaskList.description: Request a map tile for the area around Waikiki Beach at zoom level 13.
Find available webcams in the region around Waikiki Beach.
